steps.name: Workshop Email Templates and Mailing System Enhancements
steps.description:
Design and implement a full workshop email template system with per-participant opt-out, cross-workshop list combine/dedup, and editable confirmation on manual add.

## Requirements

### 1. Email Template Table (`workshop_email_template`)
- New DB table: `id`, `name`, `subject`, `body_html`, `created_by`, `is_shared` (bool), `site_name`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
- Admins can create/edit/delete any template. Workshop leaders can create private templates; optionally mark `is_shared = 1` to share with other leaders.
- Template body supports TT-style placeholder variables that get substituted at send time:
  - `[WORKSHOP_TITLE]`, `[WORKSHOP_DATE]`, `[WORKSHOP_TIME]`, `[WORKSHOP_LOCATION]`, `[WORKSHOP_INSTRUCTOR]`, `[WORKSHOP_DESCRIPTION]`, `[WORKSHOP_URL]`, `[PARTICIPANT_NAME]`
- Checkboxes on compose form to toggle which attributes are included in the rendered output (title, date, time, location, instructor, description). Unchecked attributes are omitted from the substitution.
- A free-text "Personal Note" field appended below the template content.
- New controller actions: `email_templates` (list), `create_template`, `edit_template`, `delete_template`, `preview_template`
- New templates: `WorkShops/EmailTemplates.tt`, `WorkShops/EditTemplate.tt`, `WorkShops/PreviewTemplate.tt`

### 2. Confirmation Email on Manual Add
- Add checkbox to `AddParticipant.tt`: *"Send registration confirmation email to this participant"* (checked by default)
- Add optional "Personal note to include in confirmation" textarea
- When checked, `add_participant` action fires `registration_confirmation.tt` (same as self-registration) with the optional personal note appended
- Leader can optionally select a saved email template instead of the default confirmation

### 3. Cross-Workshop Mailing (Combine + Deduplicate)
- New action `compose_multi_email` — leader selects 2+ workshops from a checklist
- System collects all `status = 'registered'` participant emails across selected workshops
- Deduplicates by email address (case-insensitive), shows deduplicated count before send
- Leader selects a template (or composes free-form), fills personal note, toggles attribute checkboxes
- Sends one email per unique address; records in `workshop_emails` for each source workshop

### 4. Participant Email Opt-Out
- Add `email_opt_out` boolean column to `participant` table (default 0)
- All bulk send actions skip participants where `email_opt_out = 1`
- Each outgoing email footer includes an unsubscribe link: `/workshop/optout/[participant_id]/[token]`
- `optout` action validates token (HMAC of participant_id + email), sets `email_opt_out = 1`, shows confirmation page
- Link on confirmation page goes to `/user/profile` to manage full notification preferences
- Participants list (`Participants.tt`) shows opt-out status with icon; leaders can manually toggle

## DB Changes
- New table: `workshop_email_template` (see schema above)
- ALTER `participant`: add `email_opt_out` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
- ALTER `workshop_emails`: add `partial` to status enum (already done in Result file — run SQL ALTER on live DB)

## Verification
- `perl -cw Comserv/script/comserv_server.pl` syntax OK
- Manual test: create template, add participant with confirmation, send bulk cross-workshop email, verify opt-out link works
- Check `email_opt_out` participants are excluded from bulk sends
